============================================================

P0 問題：
  P0_canonical_circuit_breaker_active: canonical circuit breaker remains the current-live blocker (0/15 wins in recent 50; streak=127)
    → clear the canonical circuit breaker by fixing recent-window release math or keep explicit no-deploy governance
  P0_recent_canonical_tail_pathology: recent canonical tail is still pathological (127 consecutive simulated_pyramid_win=0)
    → turn the pathological recent bull tail into a reproducible root cause and fix
  #H_AUTO_CIRCUIT_BREAKER: canonical circuit breaker active (0/15 wins in recent 50)
    → 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。
  #H_AUTO_STREAK: 連續 137 筆 1440m simulated_pyramid_win=0
